rationale: Both evaluations reach essentially identical conclusions: a seasoned full-stack/DLang/Node engineer who is a poor fit for a C++/industrial-automation role due to minimal recent C++ (only the ~6-month National Instruments stint), and no IEC 62443 or industrial-protocol experience. The strengths and concerns are the same set of points, merely reworded. The 1-point score drop (4→3) is within ordinary run-to-run noise, and no reasoning in the variant keys off the city change from Berlin to Bucharest. There are no location-referencing concerns, age proxies, or institution penalties.
